finding_title: Faulty hook location can lead to drains from legitimate hooks
summary: Silo v2/v3 public audit notes that hook placement after checks but before final collateral/debt state updates can allow a legitimate hook configuration with reentrancy to free collateral tied to debt and drain a silo. K2 可借此检查 Soroban hook/callback、token receiver、flash-loan callback 或 compose-style 外部调用是否发生在不安全的中间状态。
root_cause: external hook execution occurs after safety checks but before the debt/collateral relationship is finalized, allowing reentrant state changes to invalidate the checked assumptions
broken_invariants: checks that bind debt to collateral must remain true across any external hook/callback before final state mutation
value-moving hooks must not observe or mutate partially transitioned borrower state
attack_preconditions: 协议支持可配置 hook/callback 或外部 token interaction
hook 执行点处于 checks-effects-interactions 违背的中间状态
attacker_capability: borrower or hook participant able to trigger the value-moving flow and reenter through an allowed hook path
trigger_actions: enter a flow that passes solvency/collateral checks
use hook/callback to create or move debt/collateral before final assignment
withdraw collateral that is no longer correctly bound to debt

impact.description: collateral can be freed from debt accounting and withdrawn while debt remains or is misassigned

why_not_higher: 保留 public audit 的 High；跨到 K2 时必须证明可重入/回调点真实存在且可改变同一安全边界。
why_not_lower: hook 位置错误能破坏核心借贷抵押-债务绑定，影响资金安全。
common_false_positive_angles: Soroban 单笔调用回滚不等于没有 callback 风险；但必须找到真实外部调用或 contract invocation 边界
如果 hook 在所有状态更新完成后执行，或 reentrancy guard 覆盖同一状态，则不成立
mitigations: 将 hook 放在不会依赖过期检查的位置；对回调期间可变的账户/抵押/债务状态在返回后重新校验。

snippets.note: PDF: H-01 Faulty hook location can lead to drains from legitimate hooks
